name: Easy Party Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Kool-Aid, sugar, and water according to package instructions.
2. Add the pineapple juice; stir until well combined.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator.
4. Pour over ice in a punch bowl.
5. Stir in the chilled Seven Up.
6. Serve immediately.
7. For special punch variations, add scoops of sherbet right before serving. Use raspberry with red or lime with green mix-ins for added flavor and color.
